title: Publish llm-sanitizer v0.1.0 to PyPI
description: Walk through the full release workflow for llm-sanitizer 0.1.0: tests, changelog, build, tag, push, GitHub release, PyPI publish, and verify.

items.title: Establish repo state
items.description: Verify git status is clean, review recent commits, confirm version 0.1.0 in pyproject.toml, confirm bump type (this is the first release so version stays 0.1.0).
items.resolution: Repo is clean, on devel branch, version 0.1.0, no bump needed. First public release.

items.title: Run the full test suite
items.description:
Run: cd /Users/warnes/src/llm-sanitizer && uv run pytest tests/ -q --tb=short > /tmp/llm_san_publish_tests.txt 2>&1 && tail -20 /tmp/llm_san_publish_tests.txt

All tests must pass before proceeding.

items.title: Update CHANGELOG.md for v0.1.0
items.description: Rename [Unreleased] to [0.1.0] — 2026-04-20. Add new empty [Unreleased] above. Populate with: Initial release — scanner, rules, CLI, MCP server, formatters, readers, zero-width character detection. Requires user confirmation before saving.
items.resolution: CHANGELOG.md updated: [Unreleased] section renamed to [0.1.0] — 2026-04-20, populated with initial release items.

items.title: Validate package build
items.description:
Run: cd /Users/warnes/src/llm-sanitizer && uv build --wheel --out-dir dist/

Confirm dist/llm_sanitizer-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl exists. Smoke-test: uv run --with dist/llm_sanitizer-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl llm-sanitize --help
items.resolution: dist/llm_sanitizer-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl built. Smoke-test passed: uvx llm-sanitize --help shows scan/redact/list-rules.

items.title: Commit changelog + pyproject.toml
items.description: Stage CHANGELOG.md (and pyproject.toml if version was bumped). Commit message: 'release: bump version to 0.1.0'. REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION before git commit.
items.resolution: Committed 6958f7f: CHANGELOG.md + .github/ publish infra (instructions, prompt, OBO session).

items.title: Create git tag v0.1.0
items.description:
Run: git tag -a v0.1.0 -m 'Release 0.1.0'

REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION before tagging.

items.title: Push devel branch and tag to origin
items.description:
Releases go from main branch. Merge devel into main (fast-forward), then push main + tag v0.1.0. Also push devel to keep it in sync.

REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION.

git checkout main
git merge --ff-only devel
git push origin main
git push origin v0.1.0
git push origin devel
items.resolution: Merged devel -> main (ff-only), re-tagged v0.1.0 on main, pushed main + v0.1.0 + devel to origin.

items.title: Create GitHub release
items.description: Create release from tag v0.1.0 on Warnes-Innovations/llm-sanitizer, attach the wheel, set release notes from CHANGELOG [0.1.0] section. REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION before creating.
items.resolution: GitHub release v0.1.0 created at https://github.com/Warnes-Innovations/llm-sanitizer/releases/tag/v0.1.0 with wheel attached.

items.title: Set up PyPI API token
items.description: Confirm PyPI account exists and an API token (scoped to llm-sanitizer or project-wide) is available. Set UV_PUBLISH_TOKEN env var or confirm --token will be passed. MANUAL STEP — user must do this.

items.title: Publish to PyPI
items.description:
Run: uv publish dist/llm_sanitizer-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl

REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION. PyPI uploads are permanent — cannot be deleted, only yanked.

items.title: Verify the release
items.description:
Check PyPI visibility: pip index versions llm-sanitizer
Optionally: uvx llm-sanitize --help
Visit: https://pypi.org/project/llm-sanitizer/
Confirm v0.1.0 is listed.
